creator: fukui.FreeBSD@fanet.net
text:
Kernel module nfslockd.ko (src/sys/modules/nfslockd) cannot be compiled. It becomes a compile error.

sys/modules/nfslockd# make clean
rm -f export_syms nfslockd.ko nfslockd.kld nlm_advlock.o nlm_prot_clnt.o nlm_prot_impl.o nlm_prot_server.o nlm_prot_svc.o nlm_prot_xdr.o sm_inter_xdr.o opt_inet6.h vnode_if.h vnode_if_newproto.h vnode_if_typedef.h
sys/modules/nfslockd# make depend
@ -> /usr/src/sys
machine -> /usr/src/sys/amd64/include
awk -f @/tools/vnode_if.awk @/kern/vnode_if.src -p
awk -f @/tools/vnode_if.awk @/kern/vnode_if.src -q
awk -f @/tools/vnode_if.awk @/kern/vnode_if.src -h
echo "#define INET6 1" > opt_inet6.h
rm -f .depend
mkdep -f .depend -a   -nostdinc -D_KERNEL -DKLD_MODULE -I. -I@ -I@/contrib/altq /usr/src/sys/modules/nfslockd/../../nlm/nlm_advlock.c /usr/src/sys/modules/nfslockd/../../nlm/nlm_prot_clnt.c /usr/src/sys/modules/nfslockd/../../nlm/nlm_prot_impl.c /usr/src/sys/modules/nfslockd/../../nlm/nlm_prot_server.c /usr/src/sys/modules/nfslockd/../../nlm/nlm_prot_svc.c /usr/src/sys/modules/nfslockd/../../nlm/nlm_prot_xdr.c /usr/src/sys/modules/nfslockd/../../nlm/sm_inter_xdr.c
In file included from /usr/src/sys/modules/nfslockd/../../nlm/nlm_advlock.c:48:
@/nfsclient/nfs.h:40:21: error: opt_nfs.h: No such file or directory
In file included from /usr/src/sys/modules/nfslockd/../../nlm/nlm_prot_impl.c:56:
@/nfsclient/nfs.h:40:21: error: opt_nfs.h: No such file or directory
mkdep: compile failed
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/src/sys/modules/nfslockd.

Fix: nfslockd.ko depends on opt_nfs.h.
	But it is not defined in Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: 	see above.
